question:
①Locate a close-up shot in the video where someone is trying on a yellow and black watch.
②Identify whose wrist is wearing the watch (Person A) and who is helping put it on (Person B).
③During the fitting dialogue, the camera shifts rapidly from a close-up to a wide-angle perspective. At this moment, based on Person B's perspective, there is a series of garments on his left. From his perspective, what is the color of the rightmost garment?

①Please find a man wearing a red hat (Person X) arguing with a man in a black hoodie (Person Y).
②At the height of their argument, Person X raises his hand and touches his face; pause the screen. Connect the nose tip of Person X and the nose tip of Person Y to form a virtual line segment AB.
③Assume you are standing at Person X's position, looking towards Person Y's back along the direction of line segment AB. At this moment, the extension of AB intersects with a row of clothes to form a straight line pointing to a garment of color A. Behind Person X, there is also a garment of color A. What is the number on it?

①Find the moment in the video where a man takes a pair of fluffy slippers off the shelf.
②Memorize the specific position (Position P) of these green slippers on the shoe rack before they were removed.
③The video continues, and the man puts the green slippers on his feet and starts walking around the store. Find the moment when he is wearing these green slippers and his right foot steps exactly on a red graffiti area on the floor.
④At this time, there is another colored graffiti area next to the red one, designated as color X. In the row of shoes where Position P is located, at what ordinal position (index) is the shoe with color X as the main subject located?

①At the beginning of the video, there is a colorful wall in the room. There are several letters on it, and the color of the letters is A.
②There is a man (Person B) in the room also wearing clothes of color A, and the inside of his hat is color C.
③Find a man (Person D) who also has elements of color C on his upper garment. What color is the object held in this man's right hand?

①Please locate the segment where two people are arguing: one wearing a red hat, the other not wearing a hat and holding a mobile phone.
②There is a patch of clothes around them that matches the colors of the clothes they are wearing. Define this area as A.
③From the perspective of the person not wearing a hat, what is the color of the clothing immediately to the right of area A?

①The video shows a close-up of the ground, with green, purple, and white swirl patterns on the floor.
②Find the moment a purple plush slipper is placed on the floor.
③At this moment, a pair of white Nike Air Force 1 low-top sneakers (belonging to a person wearing denim shorts) appears in the frame.
④Establish a connecting line L from the center point of the purple slipper to the center point of the white sneaker.
⑤This connecting line L intersects the shoe rack plane at point A, where there is a pair of shoes. What is the color of the heel part of this pair of shoes?

①At the beginning of the video, lock onto the man on the left side of the screen wearing a white zip-up hoodie and a thick silver necklace (Person A).
②Find the moment he compares watches at the wrist with another man wearing a black long-sleeve shirt with white Gothic font print on the sleeves (Person B).
③While they are comparing watches, to the rear-left of Person A's perspective (right side of the screen), there is a man with an afro/curly hair wearing a black hoodie (Person C).
④Subsequently, when Person C adjusts his cuffs, he briefly turns his back to the camera, revealing white text on the back of his clothes.
⑤Assume you are currently standing at Person C's position and turning your body to fully face the wall he was facing when he turned around (the wall full of clothes). On the far right of that wall, there is a white T-shirt hanging; to the top right of this T-shirt, there is a garment with a number in the middle. What is the color of this number?

①Find a man in the video wearing a white T-shirt and a red Adidas baseball cap.
②He is discussing with the man wearing a black long-sleeve shirt (with printed sleeves).
③When the man in the red hat raises his right index finger to make a "1" gesture to emphasize the bet, please observe the background behind him.
④There is a glass display case with collectibles behind him, and several jerseys are hanging on the wall above the display case.
⑤Find the framed jersey (not a poster) closest to the red-hatted man's head.
⑥Assume you are now standing directly beneath this framed jersey, facing the store's cashier (i.e., with your back to the red-hatted man). Your line of sight crosses the aisle in the middle of the store; what is the main fill color of the letter "M" on the huge wall at the end of the aisle?

①First, locate the moment when the man wearing a black long-sleeve shirt (with "Chrome Hearts" on the sleeve) tries on a green long-haired monster slipper (Grinch slides).
②At this time, his left foot is wearing this green slipper, and his right foot is wearing a white Air Force 1 sneaker.
③Subsequently, another foot appears in the frame, wearing a matching purple long-haired slipper, and their feet step side-by-side on the special coating of the floor. Please observe this instant; in the gap between their two feet on the floor, what is the color of the floor coating pattern?

①In the video, locate the man (Person A) wearing a black Chrome Hearts hoodie and holding a red rubber shoe with bubble-like textures.
②Person A hands this red shoe to a man with an Afro hairstyle (Person B) standing to his right.
③Person B has a pattern on his chest in a specific color (Color C).
④Find a person in the frame wearing a hat of Color C. What is the color of this person's upper garment?

①Locate the area with glass display cases filled with limited edition sneakers and clothes.
②Find a man in a black long-sleeve hoodie who picks up a Teal/Turquoise and White sneaker with an orange Nike Swoosh.
③He turns to show this shoe to a man beside him wearing a black baseball cap (worn backwards).
④Observe the wall directly behind the man in the black cap, where a column of skateboards is hanging vertically.
⑤In this column, identify the most colorful skateboard that contains no black ink. What is the main color of the second skateboard located above this specific board?

①In the video, find the moment where the man in the black Chrome Hearts hoodie stands in front of the full wall of shoes.
②He reaches out and takes a green plush shoe (resembling the Grinch's foot) from the black grid rack.
③Shortly after, he takes down another shoe.
④Between the positions of these two shoes he removed, there are other shoes. What is the color of the darker shoe located between them?

①Locate the man wearing a black long-sleeve hoodie (with white gothic text on the sleeves) bending over to try on a huge Red Bubble Slide.
②Note his right foot (which is not wearing the red slide); it is placed on the floor next to another green plush monster slipper.
③The man stands up, and the camera focuses on his legs. Notice he is wearing dark blue denim shorts.
④As he steps on the green graffiti area with the red slide, observe the bottom hem of his shorts on the right leg (near the knee).
⑤There is an embroidered design at this location. What color is it?

①Find the scene where a group of people is gathered. The central figure is a man in a white zip-up hoodie and black cap (Person A), who is adjusting a red Beanie on the head of a man in a black long-sleeve T-shirt (Person B).
②Lock onto Person A (white hoodie). To his left (on the right side of the screen, closer to the camera), stands another man wearing a white short-sleeve T-shirt and a red baseball cap (Person C).
③Person C is watching the hat being put on Person B. What is the color of the item Person C is holding in his right hand?

①The camera focuses on a glass display case containing a Nike Dunk Low in Teal (Tiffany Blue) and Orange Swoosh.
②A shop assistant (Person X) wearing a black T-shirt and black baseball cap stands by the counter explaining the shoe.
③The camera zooms out slightly to reveal a translucent sticker/poster of a basketball player in a red jersey (Michael Jordan) on the glass door of the cabinet.
④Assume you are standing facing this glass door with the Jordan sticker. What is the color of the clothing item displayed in the glass section directly to the left?

①At the beginning of the video, locate the protagonist (Lacy) in a black Chrome Hearts hoodie holding a pink bubble-textured slide.
②Before he puts the pink slide on the floor to try it, notice he is wearing green plush slippers. Lock onto these green slippers.
③As he tries the pink slide on the colorful graffiti floor, the camera captures another person nearby wearing black shorts and black-and-white sneakers.
④Follow this person with the black-and-white sneakers upwards until the camera shows his face (he has fluffy black curly hair).
⑤Directly behind this curly-haired man is a wall full of clothes with a giant graffiti word background.
⑥Assume you are standing with your back against this giant graffiti wall, facing the curly-haired man. In the sofa area directly to your left, there is a framed jersey hanging on the wall. What is the number on this jersey?

①Find the moment where the group is gathered and the protagonist (Lacy) puts on a red Chrome Hearts beanie.
②Locate the man standing next to him (Silky), who is wearing a white zip-up hoodie and an "S" necklace.
③As the man in the white hoodie reaches out to adjust the red hat on Lacy, observe the background behind the white hoodie man.
④On the wall not far behind him hangs a pop art painting of a movie character (wearing a black suit and white shirt).
⑤Directly below this painting is a brown leather chair.
⑥Assume a person is sitting on that brown chair, facing the aisle of the shop. In what direction is the huge purple neon sign reading "305 KICKS" located relative to this person?

①Locate the moment when the protagonist (Lacy in the red hat) walks towards a glass display case.
②He takes out a Tiffany Blue Nike Dunk sneaker from the case.
③At this moment, a shop assistant wearing a black baseball cap (backwards) and black T-shirt approaches to talk to him.
④Note the silver watch on the assistant's wrist.
⑤When the assistant points at the Tiffany sneaker, establish a line from the assistant's watch to the sneaker.
⑥Hold this moment and look through the glass display case to the bottom shelf inside. Directly below the original position of the Tiffany sneaker, there is an object (possibly a box or another shoe). What color is it?

①In the video, first locate a man (Lacy) wearing a black Chrome Hearts long-sleeve hoodie.
②He picks up a black baseball cap with a white cross pattern and puts it on.
③He then turns to ask a man in a black T-shirt and a backward black baseball cap (Adin) for his opinion.
④Please observe the wall behind the man in the black T-shirt, where a column of boards is displayed vertically.
⑤Lock your gaze on the topmost board.
What is the background color of the brand Logo printed on it?

①In the video, find the man wearing the black Chrome Hearts long-sleeve hoodie.
②He takes a pair of jeans covered in rhinestones/shiny decorations off the rack.
③He holds the hanger with both hands and places the jeans against his body to check the length.
④At this moment, please look down at the floor beneath his feet, which features a flowing liquid swirl pattern.
Just as he is measuring the jeans, what are the two main colors of the swirl pattern in the area he is standing on?

①In the video, locate the scene where a group of people is standing in the shop's rest area, including a man wearing a white zip-up hoodie (Silky).
②He is facing the man in the black Chrome Hearts hoodie and another man in a black T-shirt (Adin) while talking.
③Please observe the wall behind the man in the white hoodie (the wall on the left side of the screen).
④There are several framed jerseys hanging on the wall. Find the red jersey among them.
What is the player number printed on the back of this red jersey?

①Find the man wearing a black hat (with three white cross patterns on it).
②As he looks in the mirror to adjust his hat, the camera captures the environment behind him.
③On the wall behind him, there is a huge word made of colorful graffiti.
④Please locate the letter "I" in this word (the second "I", located at the end of the word).
⑤Directly below this letter "I", a piece of clothing hangs (note that this item is a different color from the ones next to it).
What color are the sleeves of this piece of clothing?

①First, locate the moment when the man (Person A) is holding a pair of jeans covered in diamonds/sparkles.
②At this time, Person A is looking down at the pants, and standing directly opposite him (on the right side of the screen) is a man in a black T-shirt with his arms crossed (Person B).
③The camera pans left, displaying the wall on the other side of the shop (the wall with the jerseys).
④Please find the blue jersey hanging on the wall with the back number 10.
⑤Assume you are currently standing in Person B's position, facing Person A.
In what direction is this blue jersey with number 10 located relative to you?

①In the video, find the moment when the protagonist (wearing a black long-sleeve Chrome Hearts hoodie) tries on a black baseball cap with a white cross pattern.
②At this time, observe the wall behind him (the area on the left side of the screen), where there is a vertical skateboard display rack.
③Lock onto the topmost skateboard in this column and identify the white brand logo on the red background at the bottom of the board.
④Move your gaze left from this skateboard until you reach the vicinity of the glass door frame in the corner.
At the bottom of the wall in this corner, there is an object. What is this object?

①Locate the scene in the video where the man in the white zip-up hoodie (Silky) and a man in a white short-sleeve T-shirt are standing in front of a black sofa.
②Observe the row of framed football jerseys hanging on the wall behind the sofa.
③First, find a red Manchester United jersey with the name "POGBA" and the number "6" printed on it.
④Please move your gaze to the framed jersey directly to the left (from the video screen's perspective) of this "POGBA" jersey.
What is the number on the jersey that is closest to the blue jersey?

①Find the moment when the protagonist is holding a pair of jeans full of crystals/sequins and measuring them against his waist.
②At this time, on the background wall behind him (on the right side of the screen), multiple decorative paintings and jerseys are hanging.
③Please find a piece of Pop Art style artwork depicting a cartoon character.
Identify the color of the head decoration worn by this suited cartoon character.

① In the video, find the moment two people shake hands; one (A) wears a white T-shirt, the other (B) a black sweatshirt.
② Seconds before the handshake, B shows an item on his left wrist to A.
③ Identify the dial color C of this wrist item (watch).
④ Shift focus to the wall directly to A's right, which has many circular patterns of color C. Starting from the right, locate the third circular pattern of color C. What is the color of the pattern closest to its right?

① Find the segment where a man in a black crewneck sweatshirt is trying on a jacket.
② This jacket features a Horseshoe Logo on the front.
③ At this moment, there is a person A in the frame whose top style is extremely similar to this jacket. What is A playing with in their hand before walking towards the mirror?

① A man A wearing a shirt with a Statue of Liberty print appears in the frame.
② A once picked up a doll from place B.
③ To the left of place B, there is a pattern. What is the color of the outerwear in that pattern?

① Carefully observe the man in the black long-sleeve sweatshirt (the protagonist) showing a watch to another person, and lock the watch dial color as Color A.
② Drag the progress bar to 19:46, where the camera pans across a glass display cabinet on the floor. Find the clothing accessory of Color A in this cabinet.
③ What is the main color of the object directly beneath this clothing accessory?

① The protagonist lifts his leg to show the denim shorts he is wearing. Lock the color of the cross embroidery on the shorts as Color B.
② Afterwards, a heavier-set man with a beard appears in the frame. On his hoodie's color blocks, what color is located to the left of Color B?

① A heavier-set man in the frame holds a brown object.
② The protagonist (man in the black hat) leans in and performs an action towards this brown object. If he were to open his mouth, which part of this brown object would he have bitten off?

① Around 19:30 in the video, locate the purple neon sign hanging from the ceiling.
② Move your gaze to the right (based on the video frame), where a row of exhibits hangs on the wall.
③ Among the exhibits, there is Exhibit A which mainly features a muscular man. What is the main color of the exhibit located to the left of Exhibit A?

④ Assume you transform into this white letter Logo, maintaining the same orientation as the cap at this moment (i.e., facing the man in black).
⑤ In the direction of your "right hand" on the background wall, there is a huge graffiti word. Does the fill color of the rightmost letter of this graffiti word contain Color A?

① Locate the moment the man in the black sweatshirt stands in front of a full-length mirror with a white LED border.
② Lock onto the pink garment A on the rack to the left of the mirror.
③ The color of the garment to the right of A is B.
④ The man takes the garment off and returns it to rack area C.

② Shift your gaze to the upper part of the wall behind him, where a predominantly red decorative object hangs, labeled as A.

② Observe his lower body; he is wearing grey sweatpants with a stripe of color A on the side.

② To the front-right of this sign, there is a transparent glass display cabinet; the person closest to this cabinet is Person A.

③ The perfume bottle to the left of the one the man picked up is color B. What is the color of the garment next to the garment of color B behind Person A?
